title: Suggested improvements to Haruspex: headless mode, remove problematic decorators, rename to .cpp where appropriate

title: FOX-alpha issue in ghidra 10.4+
author: uriariel
body:
```

public class FOX-alpha extends GhidraScript

skipping ghidra_scripts_dea/FOX-alpha.java
```

title: yara.py object has no attribute

body:
